privileged_info_summary: Verified all metadata claims against the provided 'tag_specifications.csv' and 'process_sensor_readings.csv' files. The 'process_sensor_readings.csv' data is confirmed to be non-synthetic and directly derived from the real UCI Air Quality Dataset (2004-2005 sensor readings from an Italian city), successfully matching the dataset's exact minimum (-1.9) and maximum (44.6) values for temperature after excluding missing placeholders (-200). The low alarm (0.65) and high alarm (35.98) thresholds explicitly correspond to statistically derived values (mean ± 2 standard deviations) computed over the actual temperature dataset. The tag properties (TT_001, Ambient Temperature Sensor, Float, Degrees Celsius) all exactly match the first row of 'tag_specifications.csv' and the explicit task description instructions.
